metadata.title: Sneaking Around a Corner for a Clean 2v1 Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
This clip shows how careful movement and timing can turn the tide in a tough 2v1. Which spots do you like to use for surprise plays?
Drop your own clutch moments in the comments!

Share your best clutch plays in the comments below!
